de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class SemisequentTacletAppIndex

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.SemisequentTacletAppIndex

  • public class SemisequentTacletAppIndex
extends Object
    This class holds TermTacletAppIndexs for all formulas of a semisequent.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private boolean antec 
      private TermTacletAppIndexCacheSet indexCaches 
      private RuleFilter ruleFilter 
      private Sequent seq 
      private ImmutableMap<SequentFormula,TermTacletAppIndex> termIndices 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      private SemisequentTacletAppIndex(SemisequentTacletAppIndex orig) 
      (package private) SemisequentTacletAppIndex(Sequent s, boolean antec, Services services, TacletIndex tacletIndex, NewRuleListener listener, RuleFilter ruleFilter, TermTacletAppIndexCacheSet indexCaches)
      Create an index object for the semisequent determined by s and antec that contains term indices for each formula.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      private void addTaclets(RuleFilter filter, SequentFormula cfma, Sequent s, Services services, TacletIndex tacletIndex, NewRuleListener listener)
      Update the index for the given formula, which is supposed to be an element of the map termIndices, by adding the taclets that are selected by filter Note: destructive, use only when constructing new index
      SemisequentTacletAppIndex addTaclets(RuleFilter filter, Sequent s, Services services, TacletIndex tacletIndex, NewRuleListener listener)
      Create an index that additionally contains the taclets that are selected by filter

      Add an index for the given formula to the map termIndices.
      private void addTermIndices(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> cfmas, Sequent s, Services services, TacletIndex tacletIndex, NewRuleListener listener)
      Add indices for the given formulas to the map termIndices.

      ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getTacletAppAt(PosInOccurrence pos, RuleFilter filter) 
      ImmutableList<TacletApp> getTacletAppAtAndBelow(PosInOccurrence pos, RuleFilter filter, Services services) 
      private TermTacletAppIndex getTermIndex(PosInOccurrence pos)
      Get term index for the formula to which position pos points

      Remove the formulas that are listed as modified by infos
      private void removeTermIndex(SequentFormula cfma)
      Remove the index for the given formula from the map termIndices.
      private void removeTermIndices(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> cfmas)
      Remove the indices for the given formulas from the map termIndices.

      Reports all cached rule apps.

      called if a formula has been replaced

      private void updateTermIndices(ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> oldIndices, ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> infos, Sequent newSeq, Services services, TacletIndex tacletIndex, NewRuleListener listener)
      Update the given list of term indices according to the list infos of modification information.

        private ImmutableMap<SequentFormula,TermTacletAppIndex> termIndices

    • Constructor Detail

      • SemisequentTacletAppIndex

        SemisequentTacletAppIndex(Sequent s,
                          boolean antec,
                          Services services,
                          TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                          NewRuleListener listener,
                          RuleFilter ruleFilter,
                          TermTacletAppIndexCacheSet indexCaches)
        Create an index object for the semisequent determined by s and antec that contains term indices for each formula.
        Parameters:
        antec - iff true create an index for the antecedent of s, otherwise for the succedent

      • SemisequentTacletAppIndex

        private SemisequentTacletAppIndex(SemisequentTacletAppIndex orig)

    • Method Detail

      • addTermIndices

        private void addTermIndices(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> cfmas,
                            Sequent s,
                            Services services,
                            TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                            NewRuleListener listener)
        Add indices for the given formulas to the map termIndices. Existing entries are replaced with the new indices. Note: destructive, use only when constructing new index

      • addTermIndex

        private void addTermIndex(SequentFormula cfma,
                          Sequent s,
                          Services services,
                          TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                          NewRuleListener listener)
        Add an index for the given formula to the map termIndices. An existing entry is replaced with the new one. Note: destructive, use only when constructing new index

      • addTaclets

        private void addTaclets(RuleFilter filter,
                        SequentFormula cfma,
                        Sequent s,
                        Services services,
                        TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                        NewRuleListener listener)
        Update the index for the given formula, which is supposed to be an element of the map termIndices, by adding the taclets that are selected by filter Note: destructive, use only when constructing new index

      • removeTermIndices

        private void removeTermIndices(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> cfmas)
        Remove the indices for the given formulas from the map termIndices. Note: destructive, use only when constructing new index

      • removeTermIndex

        private void removeTermIndex(SequentFormula cfma)
        Remove the index for the given formula from the map termIndices. Note: destructive, use only when constructing new index

      • removeFormulas

        private ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> removeFormulas(ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> infos)
        Remove the formulas that are listed as modified by infos
        Returns:
        the old indices in the same order as the list infos Note: destructive, use only when constructing new index

      • updateTermIndices

        private void updateTermIndices(ImmutableList<TermTacletAppIndex> oldIndices,
                               ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> infos,
                               Sequent newSeq,
                               Services services,
                               TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                               NewRuleListener listener)
        Update the given list of term indices according to the list infos of modification information. Both lists have to be compatible, i.e. same length and same order. The new indices are inserted in the map termIndices. Note: destructive, use only when constructing new index

      • updateTermIndices

        private void updateTermIndices(ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> infos,
                               Sequent newSeq,
                               Services services,
                               TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                               NewRuleListener listener)

        public SemisequentTacletAppIndex copy()

      • getTermIndex

        private TermTacletAppIndex getTermIndex(PosInOccurrence pos)
        Get term index for the formula to which position pos points

      • getTacletAppAt

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getTacletAppAt(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                                    RuleFilter filter)
        Returns:
        all taclet apps for the given position

      • getTacletAppAtAndBelow

        public ImmutableList<TacletApp> getTacletAppAtAndBelow(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                                       RuleFilter filter,
                                                       Services services)
        Returns:
        all taclet apps for or below the given position

      • sequentChanged

        public SemisequentTacletAppIndex sequentChanged(SequentChangeInfo sci,
                                                Services services,
                                                TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                                                NewRuleListener listener)
        called if a formula has been replaced
        Parameters:
        sci - SequentChangeInfo describing the change of the sequent

      • addTaclets

        public SemisequentTacletAppIndex addTaclets(RuleFilter filter,
                                            Sequent s,
                                            Services services,
                                            TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                                            NewRuleListener listener)
        Create an index that additionally contains the taclets that are selected by filter
        Parameters:
        filter - The taclets that are supposed to be added

      • reportRuleApps

        void reportRuleApps(NewRuleListener l)
        Reports all cached rule apps. Calls ruleAdded on the given NewRuleListener for every cached taclet app.
